title: Validate ladder name
system: You are a senior TypeScript developer. Always export your functions. Never add comments to code.
user:
Create and export a function `isValidLadderName` that validates a ladder name.

Requirements:
1. Function signature: `export function isValidLadderName(name: string): boolean`
2. Must be 1-20 characters
3. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, spaces, hyphens, and underscores
4. Must not be empty or only whitespace
5. Must not start or end with a space

Only output the function code. Make sure to use `export` keyword.
